title: Fresh Environment
description: Subtle visual tweaks including better rain and snow, cloud variation and more
body:
![Fresh Environment Title Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b77f503b825aad8fcf8790a6032a01c39164faef.png)

## 📜 ABOUT **Fresh Environment** gives Minecraft a softer and more atmospheric feel through many subtle visual tweaks. From gentle rain and snowfall to varied clouds, the pack creates a calmer and more immersive environment while staying true to the vanilla style. **Works beautifully alongside my other vanilla-friendly [resource packs](https://modrinth.com/user/BlueHDGaming/resourcepacks).**
![Rain Vanilla vs. Fresh Environment](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90fd299074477c00c185415eefcf9fedad8d98d0.webp) ![Snow Vanilla vs. Fresh Environment](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b8de0a6c8dc9353c2dd3bdd5cf4540e2e30f863e.webp)

### Features - Softer and less intrusive **rain** with adjusted splash and water drip particles - Lighter **snowfall** with varying density - More dynamic **clouds** with clear and overcast skies and additional cloud types - Smooth entity shadows - Improved moon texture - HD sun and moon glare - HD End flashes - Recolored and denoised End sky - Enhanced world border - Softer vignette effect No mods required, no performance impact and compatible with most shaders and mods like Particle Rain.


## 🤝 SPARKED HOST Planning a new SMP or Minecraft project?\ You can support my work and get **25% off** using code **BLUEHD** at Sparked Host.
